channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Bill Belichick's girlfriend seemingly shuts down rumors coach will leave North Carolina for NFL
item.description: The girlfriend of North Carolina Tar Heels coach Bill Belichick poured cold water on the rumors he was going to jump back into the professional ranks.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Dispute centered around rev-sharing leads to Xavier Lucas leaving Wisconsin for Miami
item.description: Wisconsin Badgers defensive back Xavier Lucas made the unprecedented decision to join the Miami Hurricanes football program without going through the transfer portal
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Wife-and-husband duo Elina Svitolina and Gael Monfils win on the same court at the Australian Open
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Gael Monfils joined Roger Federer as the only men to reach the Australian Open's fourth round at age 38 or older since the tournament field expanded to 128 players in 1988, coming back to beat No. 4 seed Taylor Fritz 3-6, 7-5, 7-6 (1), 6-4 on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Defending champ Jannik Sinner gets back to the fourth round at the Australian Open
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Defending champion Jannik Sinner beat 46th-ranked Marcos Giron of the U.S. 6-3, 6-4, 6-2 at the Australian Open on Saturday night, reaching the fourth round at Melbourne Park for the fourth time. Sinner stretched his unbeaten run to 17 matches, dating to last season.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Dougherty Valley gets statement win over De La Salle behind electric performance from Jalen Stokes
item.description: Bay Area high school basketball: Dougherty Valley downs De La Salle as Jalen Stokes explodes for 32 points
item.dc:creator: Nathan Canilao, The Mercury News

item.title: Mavericks beat Thunder 106-98 as OKC All-Star Shai Gilgeous-Alexander sits with wrist injury
item.description: DALLAS (AP) — Kyrie Irving scored 25 points, Spencer Dinwiddie and P.J. Washington Jr. added 16 apiece and the Dallas Mavericks beat Oklahoma City 106-98 Friday night as Thunder All-Star Shai Gilgeous-Alexander missed his first game of the season.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Penguins' Nedeljkovic makes NHL history as he becomes 1st goalie with goal and assist in a game
item.description: BUFFALO, N.Y. (AP) — Alex Nedeljkovic remembers admiring the way Marty Turco and Martin Brodeur handled the puck during his childhood. On Friday night, he accomplished something neither of them — or any other goalie — had ever done.
item.dc:creator: JOE YERDON, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Prized Japanese pitcher Roki Sasaki says he intends to sign with Los Angeles Dodgers
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Prized Japanese pitcher Roki Sasaki says in an Instagram post he intends to sign with the World Series champion Los Angeles Dodgers.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Sammy Sosa gets warm reception for his reconciliation with the Chicago Cubs
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Sammy Sosa jogged onto the stage, carrying an American flag. The crowd cheered wildly. It was just like old times — only Sosa was dressed in a suit, and the scene occurred in a downtown hotel ballroom instead of Wrigley Field.
item.dc:creator: JAY COHEN, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Australian Open: Iga Swiatek is in total control during a 6-1, 6-0 rout of Emma Raducanu
item.description: Iga Swiatek has described her performance as perfect after a 6-1, 6-0 victory over Emma Raducanu at the Australian Open.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Charley Hoffman, Rico Hoey charge into the lead midway through The American Express
item.description: LA QUINTA, Calif. (AP) — Charley Hoffman knows his time on the PGA Tour is running short. He can feel every one of his 48 years whenever his troublesome back acts up, and he knows the recent reduction in tour cards will end most players’ careers well before they reach his age.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ex-49er Dana Stubblefield to remain in prison for now after judge denies bail ruling
item.description: SAN JOSE, Calif. (AP) — Former San Francisco 49er Dana Stubblefield, whose 2020 rape conviction was vacated late last year, will remain in California state prison for now after a judge declined to make a bail ruling Friday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Cowboys interview Eagles' Kellen Moore, 1st formal step in search to replace Mike McCarthy
item.description: FRISCO, Texas (AP) — The Dallas Cowboys completed a virtual interview Friday with Philadelphia offensive coordinator Kellen Moore, the first formal step in the search to replace former coach Mike McCarthy.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Titans hire Chiefs executive Mike Borgonzi as their general manager
item.description: NASHVILLE, Tenn. (AP) — The Tennessee Titans already had the No. 1 overall draft pick. Now, Mike Borgonzi will help them figure out what to do with that selection in April. The Titans announced Friday they hired the Kansas City assistant general manager as their 15th general manager.
item.dc:creator: TERESA M. WALKER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Japanese phenom pitcher Roki Sasaki picks Dodgers
item.description: The right-hander was one of the most coveted international free agents in recent memory, but the Dodgers won the race to land the coveted pitcher's services.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Jets interview Vikings' Flores and McCown and Packers' Hafley for their head coaching job
item.description: The New York Jets interviewed Minnesota Vikings defensive coordinator Brian Flores and quarterbacks coach Josh McCown and Green Bay Packers defensive coordinator Jeff Hafley on Friday for their head coach vacancy.
item.dc:creator: DENNIS WASZAK Jr., Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ravens, Bills brace for frigid temps and possible snow in AFC divisional round matchup
item.description: The hottest ticket for this weekend's NFL divisional round matchups will be played on the coldest field when the Buffalo Bills host the Baltimore Ravens Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Dawn Staley's $25M extension is richest salary in women's college hoops history, South Carolina says
item.description: COLUMBIA, S.C. (AP) — Coach Dawn Staley received a contract extension on Friday that South Carolina said will make her the highest paid college women's basketball coach of all time at a total value of about $25 million.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jackson Mahomes, brother of Chiefs star, posts farewell TikTok video to followers
item.description: Jackson Mahomes, the brother of Kansas City Chiefs superstar quarterback Patrick Mahomes, put out a farewell video to his TikTok followers on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: BYU bounces back with 85-69 win over Oklahoma State
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - The BYU basketball team snapped a three-game losing skid with an 85-69 win over Oklahoma State Tuesday night at the Marriott Center.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Bruins open 4-goal lead, add 2 short-handed empty-netters to beat Lightning 6-2
item.description: David Pastrnak had a goal and two assists and Parker Wotherspoon scored his first NHL goal on Tuesday night to help the Boston Bruins open a four-goal lead and hold on to beat the Tampa Bay Lightning 6-2.
item.dc:creator: JIMMY GOLEN, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Coaching Tracker: The Bears' search to find their next head coach
item.description: The Chicago Bears have assembled a six-person panel to find their next head coach, with Ryan Poles as the final decision-maker, and have requested to interview Joe Brady, Thomas Brown, Matt Campbell, Pete Carroll, Brian Flores, Marcus Freeman, Aaron Glenn, Joe Brady, and David Shaw.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: New England Patriots hire former Super Bowl champ Mike Vrabel as next coach
item.description: Vrabel, a fan favorite during eight seasons as a player in New England where he was a member of its first three Super Bowl winners and an inductee into the team’s Hall of Fame in 2023, was the preferred candidate because of his long association with the franchise and coaching success.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Jackson and Henry lead the way as the Ravens run over the rival Steelers 28-14 in the AFC playoffs
item.description: BALTIMORE (AP) — Lamar Jackson handed off to Derrick Henry, then slid out to the left as if he still had the ball. A couple linebackers shifted into Jackson's path, leaving the middle open for Henry to run through for a 44-yard touchdown.
item.dc:creator: NOAH TRISTER, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Nationals and Jorge López agree to $3 million, 1-year deal
item.description: The Washington Nationals and former All-Star pitcher Jorge López agreed to terms on a 1-year contract, the team announced Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5
